subcodes.first_line: We make mention, in this station, of him who hath circumambulated the Throne, and his sister, and counsel them to patience and forbearance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر فی هذا المقام ام من طاف حول العرش و اخته و نوصیهما بالصبر و الاصطبار
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
